_comment: Golden set: real-correct answers for the extract_job task. Each case lists only the fields with a clear ground truth; the eval scorer grades a prediction against exactly those fields. skills are scored by overlap (Jaccard), the rest by exact match.

cases.job_text: Senior Backend Engineer at Atlassian, Sydney. Full-time, $160,000-$190,000 AUD. Hybrid working. You'll work with Python, Go, PostgreSQL, AWS and Docker.
Graduate Data Analyst (6-month internship) in Melbourne. On-site. Skills: SQL, Excel, Power BI, Python.
Casual barista wanted in Brisbane. $28/hr. No experience needed, training provided.

AI Automation Specialist at AERA, Alexandria, Sydney NSW (Hybrid). Full time. Strong programming and scripting (Python, PowerShell, Bash); hands-on with AI/ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn) and automation platforms (Ansible, Terraform, Zapier, Make).
Lead Machine Learning Engineer, fully remote. 12-month contract, $90-120/hr USD. PyTorch, TensorFlow, Kubernetes, MLflow.
Part-time Junior Frontend Developer at Canva, Sydney (hybrid). $45/hr. React, TypeScript, CSS.
DevOps Engineer - Telstra, Canberra. Full time. Terraform, Ansible, AWS, Jenkins, Bash.
Hiring an Account Manager, full-time, Perth. Tools: Salesforce, HubSpot, Excel.
